claims.claim_text: Punjab Kings has lost five consecutive matches.
claims.evidence_text: Five losses on the bounce have left Punjab Kings with the unenviable task of taking down defending champion Royal Challengers Bengaluru.

claims.claim_text: PBKS has only one win in seven games at HPCA Stadium since 2023.
claims.evidence_text: Since 2023, PBKS has just one win in seven games at the venue.

claims.claim_text: Virat Kohli has scored a record-extending ninth IPL century.
claims.evidence_text: Kohli comes on the back of a record-extending ninth IPL century.
